papers.title: Rag Classification of Tagore Songs using Symbolic Music Notation and Novel Weighted Distance Measures
papers.abstract: Rabindra Sangeet, the body of songs written and composed by Rabindranath Tagore, occupies a distinctive position in Indian music. This paper formulates rag identification in Rabindra Sangeet as a supervised classification problem using symbolic music-sheet notations from Swarabitan, introducing a weighted Euclidean distance measure for improved rag classification in k-NN framework.

papers.title: Audio-Visual Multi-Speaker Speech Recognition in Meeting Scenarios
papers.abstract: Research on audio-visual multi-speaker speech recognition focusing on meeting scenarios, leveraging both audio and visual modalities for improved speaker diarization and transcription in multi-party conversations.

papers.title: Sound Event Detection and Audio Scene Analysis with Multi-Task Learning
papers.abstract: A multi-task learning framework for joint sound event detection and audio scene analysis, improving performance across both tasks through shared representations.

papers.title: Self-Supervised Learning for Robust Speech Enhancement
papers.abstract: Novel self-supervised learning approaches for robust speech enhancement in noisy real-world environments, achieving state-of-the-art results on benchmark datasets.

papers.title: Low-Resource Speech Recognition with Multilingual Transfer Learning
papers.abstract: Efficient multilingual transfer learning techniques for low-resource speech recognition, demonstrating significant improvements for underrepresented languages.

papers.title: End-to-End Neural Audio Coding with Perceptual Optimization
papers.abstract: An end-to-end neural audio codec framework with perceptual optimization, achieving high compression ratios while maintaining perceptual audio quality.

papers.title: Real-Time Streaming ASR with Dynamic Chunking Strategies
papers.abstract: Dynamic chunking strategies for real-time streaming automatic speech recognition, balancing latency and accuracy in online settings.

news.title: 京东在 WAIC 2026 发布 JoyAI-Talker 实时语音交互模型
news.summary: 京东于 2026 世界人工智能大会（WAIC）上发布 JoyAI-Talker 实时语音交互模型，支持低延迟对话与情绪理解，同时开源 EgoLive 数据集。该模型面向物理世界 AI 应用场景，是京东 JoyAI 矩阵的重要组成部分。

news.title: 阿里发布 Qwen-Audio-3.0-Realtime 实时语音交互对话模型
news.summary: 阿里巴巴于 2026 年 7 月发布 Qwen-Audio-3.0-Realtime，这是一款实时语音交互对话模型，在智商、Agent 工具调用、共情对话等方面表现突出，已在阿里云百炼平台上线。

news.title: WAIC 2026 开幕：108款芯片、261款大模型亮相
news.summary: 2026 世界人工智能大会（WAIC）于7月17日开幕，9位图灵奖得主出席，展出261款大模型和108款芯片。语音、多模态、具身智能成为本届大会热点话题。

news.title: Google 发布 Gemini 3.5 Pro：2M上下文 + Deep Think 推理
news.summary: Google 于7月17日发布 Gemini 3.5 Pro，提供2M上下文窗口和Deep Think推理能力。虽然并非纯语音模型，但其多模态能力涵盖音频理解，对语音AI生态有重要影响。

news.title: 阿里千问确认成为 Apple Intelligence 国行本土化提供方
news.summary: 网信办公布 Apple Intelligence 完成备案，阿里千问确认为国行 Apple Intelligence 本土化能力提供方。这将推动千问音频/语音模型在 iOS 生态中的深度集成。
